DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT HAPPY CAMPER,LLCS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVE BOULLIANNE,PARTNER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1280 TO THE PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND A JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED AND OTHER DAMAGES WILL BE CONSIDERED. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAR-16-2021 HEARING THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT STEVE BOULLIANNE IS DISMISSED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
